ops.title: Pack blocks: plugin-supplied types with lossless JSON fallback
ops.body: Dotted block types (<pack>.<name>) decode to Block.pack carrying the entire block object as JSONValue; encode emits that raw value alone (no discriminator write — it would double-encode type). Dot-free unknown types still throw. This lossless round-trip is the invariant that keeps event-log replay total on iOS when a pack is uninstalled: never add typed pack structs, never let encode drop unknown fields. pack.interaction reduces LWW into interactions.packs (payload verbatim) and snapshots into RoundRecord.packs on round close. PackPlaceholderView in BlockView.swift is Phase 5b's replacement point (webview); JSONValue and BoardStore.subject are public for that integration.
ops.when: before modifying Block encode/decode, replacing PackPlaceholderView, or extending the block type system
